panels.title: Total cost (Copilot, estimated)
panels.description: Estimate from token usage × public per-token API prices. NOT what GitHub bills you (Copilot is seat-licensed).

targets.expr:
sum(
    (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model="gpt-4.1", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[$__range]) * 0.000002)
  or (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model="gpt-4.1", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[$__range]) * 0.000008)
  or (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini.*", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[$__range]) * 0.00000015)
  or (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini.*", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[$__range]) * 0.0000006)
  or (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[$__range]) * 0.0000025)
  or (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[$__range]) * 0.00001)
  or (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"claude-3-5-sonnet.*|claude-3.5-sonnet.*|claude-3-7-sonnet.*|claude-3.7-sonnet.*|claude-sonnet-4.*", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[$__range]) * 0.000003)
  or (increase(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"claude-3-5-sonnet.*|claude-3.5-sonnet.*|claude-3-7-sonnet.*|claude-3.7-sonnet.*|claude-sonnet-4.*", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[$__range]) * 0.000015)
)

panels.title: Total tool calls / edits
panels.description: Claude Code: edit tool decisions. Copilot: tool call counter.

panels.title: Cost rate (USD/hour)
panels.description: Claude Code: actual. Copilot: estimated from token usage × public model API prices.

targets.expr:
sum(
    (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model="gpt-4.1", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[5m]) * 0.000002)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model="gpt-4.1", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[5m]) * 0.000008)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini.*", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[5m]) * 0.00000015)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini.*", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[5m]) * 0.0000006)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[5m]) * 0.0000025)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[5m]) * 0.00001)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"claude-3-5-sonnet.*|claude-3.5-sonnet.*|claude-3-7-sonnet.*|claude-3.7-sonnet.*|claude-sonnet-4.*", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[5m]) * 0.000003)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"claude-3-5-sonnet.*|claude-3.5-sonnet.*|claude-3-7-sonnet.*|claude-3.7-sonnet.*|claude-sonnet-4.*", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[5m]) * 0.000015)
) * 3600

sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (
    (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model="gpt-4.1", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[5m]) * 0.000002)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model="gpt-4.1", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[5m]) * 0.000008)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini.*", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[5m]) * 0.00000015)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini.*", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[5m]) * 0.0000006)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[5m]) * 0.0000025)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[5m]) * 0.00001)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"claude-3-5-sonnet.*|claude-3.5-sonnet.*|claude-3-7-sonnet.*|claude-3.7-sonnet.*|claude-sonnet-4.*", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[5m]) * 0.000003)
  or (rate(gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"claude-3-5-sonnet.*|claude-3.5-sonnet.*|claude-3-7-sonnet.*|claude-3.7-sonnet.*|claude-sonnet-4.*", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[5m]) * 0.000015)
) * 3600
